name: White Beans, Hijiki, Rice, and Red Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the white beans until tender.
2. Add the hijiki sea vegetable towards the end of cooking to prevent it from falling apart.
3. Sauté the diced red cabbage in balsamic vinegar and water until tender.
4. Mix together the cooked beans, rice, sautéed red cabbage, and 2 tbsp balsamic vinegar.
5. Stir in tamari sauce to taste.
6. Allow the dish to sit for a few minutes so that the flavors can blend together.
7. The finished dish resembles veg-scrapple but offers a delicious flavor profile that is both sweet and vinegary. It can be enjoyed without additional tamari, though its taste will be slightly less pronounced.
